capture-method.description: How the terminal output was captured.

capture-tool.description: Tool or subsystem used to capture terminal output (for example script, agent, terminal multiplexer, or EDR sensor).

command.description: Command line or statement that generated the terminal output.

comment.description: Contextual information about the terminal output.

encoding.description: Character encoding used in the terminal output.

output-reference.description: Reference to the terminal context, such as host, TTY/PTS identifier, session ID, or log source path.

output-stream.description: Output stream where the text was observed.

return-code.description: Return or exit code associated with the executed command.

terminal-type.description: Terminal family or operating-system context of the output.

timestamp.description: Timestamp when the terminal output was observed or collected.

description: Object describing captured terminal output, including platform context, encoding, capture method, and resulting text.
name: terminal-output
